why should the Gas company

why should these corporations

vate citizen? 1t is simply the same

II you are not using gas or cleo
tricity, the company has right to
remove your meter, but it has abso,
lutely no right to demand money
for something you have not used.


They cannot charge you for
meter Tor they are compelled to
furnish these. They cannot charge
you for reading the meter for that
is not your concern. They can not
charge you for leaving the pipes
connected for they can disconnect
them at any time you stop using
their products, and as long as you
want to use it they are bound to
keep in the pipes or wires, and II
they disconnect them whenever you
